assumptions: Retrospective analysis of already-public DESI DR1/DR2 compressed BAO data.
Gaussian BAO likelihood with covariance treated as fixed in cosmology.
BAO scale parameter theta=H0*r_d/c; H0 and r_d are not separately inferred.
No CMB, supernova, or external sound-horizon prior.
Baseline radiation density is zero; a fixed-radiation sensitivity is reported separately.

CAS_LOG.description: Logarithmic cascade-to-FRW ansatz with fitted w0; mapping remains exploratory.
CAS_LOG.regularity_note: At w0=-1 this nests LambdaCDM on a boundary.

CAS_POLY.description: Phenomenological polynomial cascade ansatz with fitted w0 and gamma>=0.

goodness_of_fit.warning: Suppressed because boundary/singularity invalidates naive degrees of freedom.

reasons: fit is boundary-constrained, singular, or not full-rank

CAS_POLY.regularity_note: Gamma is unidentifiable at w0=-1; regular criteria are then invalid.
warnings: Best fit reaches declared bound(s): gamma
Numerical Hessian is rank deficient or non-positive.
